entity.summary: Concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange built for Linea, providing token swaps, custom price-range liquidity positions, reduced-slippage trading, liquidity provision, farms, and related DEX features.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates duplicate HorizonDEX source rows into one Linea DEX entity. Current first-party application remains reachable, while official documentation identifies HorizonDEX as a concentrated-liquidity DEX and documents swaps, liquidity positions, farms, and capital-efficiency mechanics.

evidence.title: HorizonDEX Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies HorizonDEX as a concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange for Linea and exposes swap, liquidity, concentrated-liquidity, farm, native-DEX, governance, audit, and contract sections.

evidence.title: HorizonDEX Swap documentation
evidence.notes: First-party swap documentation describes token selection, liquidity checks, slippage and fee review, on-chain execution through the HorizonDEX dApp, and wallet settlement.

evidence.title: HorizonDEX Concentrated Liquidity documentation
evidence.notes: First-party technical documentation describes HorizonDEX concentrated-liquidity pools, custom price ranges, ticks, LP fee earning, capital efficiency, and reduced-slippage trading mechanics.
